name: Rank 2
tooltip: Increases the strength of the power by 20% and its energy building strength by ~10%.

name: Rank 3
tooltip: Increases the strength of the power by 20% and its energy building strength by ~10%.

name: Accelerated Metabolism
tooltip: Every time you use this ability you have a 20% chance to return 10% of your maximum energy. This effect may only occur once every 15 seconds, even if you have this advantage on multiple powers.

name: Challenge!
tooltip: This advantage causes this attack to generate additional threat against all affected targets, making them more likely to attack you.+ Primary targets receive a large amount of threat every 2 seconds for 4 seconds and a 10% damage debuff for up to 10 seconds which degrades as you take damage from them.+ Secondary targets suffer half as much threat every 2 seconds for 10 seconds and have their damage debuffed by 5% for up to 10 seconds.+ Effect cannot be refreshed or stacked more than once from any of your abilities.+ Some powers lack primary or secondary targets and may only apply the primary or secondary effect."

name: Commanding Presence
tooltip: Applies a large threat over time effect to your target.  This effect stacks with Challenge.

name: Break Through
tooltip: When the target is blocking, hitting them with this power disables their block for 10 seconds.+ Applies Provoked to the target if they were blocking. Provoked lowers their damage resistance, healing, and dodge for 10 seconds.+ Your target can removed Provoked by damaging you.+ Provoked cannot be stacked by any target and cannot be refreshed.+ After 10 seconds, your target will gain Unwavering for 10 seconds. Unwavering prevents their block from being disabled for the duration.+ If used against a target that isnt blocking, they will gain instead gain Unwavering.

name: Rank 2
tooltip: Increases the speed of this travel power.

name: Rank 3
tooltip: Further increases the speed of this travel power.

name: 20/20 Fission

The likelihood of that reality being populated is astronomically low, so it's probably fine.

name: Barrier
tooltip: Maintaining this power grants you an absorption shield that scales up over time. This shield is removed when you stop maintaining this power.

name: Overwhelming Force
tooltip: On a full charge, instead of targets being Knocked, your primary target is Paralyzed for 12 seconds and secondary targets are Stunned for 1.7 seconds.

name: Focus Point
tooltip: Changes this power to affect only the primary target, reduces its cost to 45-128, and increases its base damage to 294-1253.

name: Gravitational Pull
tooltip: Targets are now Knocked Up instead of being Knocked Back.

name: Expel Impurity
tooltip: Removes 1 damage over time effect with the highest duration from your target.

name: Force Sheathe
tooltip: The Force Shield effect persists for a few seconds after you stop blocking, and it will continue to feed you Energy from all incoming attacks, as well as providing a small defensive benefit.

name: Chemical Fire
tooltip: Instead of applying Clinging Flames, this power now has a chance to apply Plasma Burn.Note: Plasma in this case refers to a state of matter, not a chemical.

name: Download
tooltip: Applies Download to you, reducing the cost of Technology powers for 12 secs.

name: Breakout
tooltip: If the target is under a Control effect, applies Breakfree damage. This effect can occur only once ever 10 seconds.

name: Burning Sun
tooltip: On a full charge, creates a Healing Rune beneath the user.

name: Fan the Flames
tooltip: Flashfire refreshes the duration of your Engulfing Flames and again when the Pyre Patch it creates lasts for half of its duration. Pyre Patch effects created by other abilities also refresh Engulfing Flames when they last for their full duration.

name: Intimidating Force
tooltip: This power now Knocks Down targets.

name: Fighting Spirit
tooltip: When this effect expires, the healing penalty is reduced by 5 seconds.

name: Fiery Spirit
tooltip: Each hit has a chance to apply Clinging Flames to targets. Finishing the combo guarantees the application of Clinging Flames on your primary target.

name: Fiery Blade
tooltip: Instead of Disorient, each hit has a change to apply Clinging Flames instead.

name: Aftershock
tooltip: Fully charing Brimstone now creates a Pyre Patch. The Pyre Patch persists on the ground for 10 seconds. Every second, it deals Fire damage and has a 10% chance to apply Clinging Flames to enemies standing in it. You can only have one Pyre Patch active at a time.

name: Chi Flame
tooltip: Fully charging this power applies Chi Flame to the target(s).

name: Corrosion
tooltip: Refreshes all of your Poison stacks.

name: Demolishing Strikes
tooltip: When this combo is completed, it applies Demolish to the target instead of Lithe.

name: Demolishing Strikes
tooltip: When this power is fully maintained, applies Demolish to your primary target.

name: Devoid
tooltip: On a full charge, applies Devoid to the target.

name: Disintegration Ray
tooltip: When fully charged, applies Disintegrate.

name: Dizzying Impact
tooltip: Add chance to Disorient depending on charge time (up to 100%)

name: Dizzying Impact
tooltip: When fully charged, applies Disorient to targets.

name: Engulfing Flames
tooltip: Applies Engulfing Flames to the target. Engulfing Flames deals Fire damage every 2 seconds for 10 seconds.

name: Engulfing Flames
tooltip: Has a 50 chance to apply it to secondary targets. Clinging Flames deals Fire damage every 2 seconds for 12 seconds, with a chance to leap to other nearby targets. Clinging Flames is a Burning effect. Engulfing Flames deals Fire damage every 2 seconds for 10 seconds.

name: Entropy Field
tooltip: Places up to 5 targets within 25 feet of your primary target in a Power Shield.

name: Fester
tooltip: Fully charging Vile Lariat debuffs your target by -5% damage strength over 12 seconds for every one of your Poison stacks.

name: Floating Lotus Blossom
tooltip: Finishing this combo causes your Archery powers to apply Quick Maneuvering to you for the next 10 seconds.  Quick Maneuvering increases your Dodge chance by 5%, lasts for 12 seconds and stacks up to 10 times. All stacks of Quick Maneuvering are lost when you successfully dodge an attack.

name: Frail Armor
tooltip: Refreshes your Armor Piercing debuff by up to 15 seconds.

name: Frost Bite
tooltip: Ice Blast now refreshes the Chilled Debuff on targets.

name: Head Trauma
tooltip: Finishing the combo applies Bewildered to your primary target. If your target charges up powers while affected by Bewildered, they will be stunned briefly.

name: Illuminate
tooltip: Applies Illuminated to the target.

name: Light Everlasting
tooltip: Applies Light Everlasting to allies near the primary target.

name: Light Everlasting
tooltip: When fully maintained, applies Light Everlasting to nearby allies.

name: Mystical
tooltip: Has a chance to apply and refresh all stacks of Mystified on you. Mystified lasts 15 seconds and reduces the cost of your Sorcery, Celestial, Darkness, and Infernal powers by 3%, stacking up to 3 times.  Mystified is an Enchantment.

name: Mystical
tooltip: On a full maintain, applies and refreshes Mystical on you.

name: No Quarter
tooltip: Applies No Quarter to targets.

name: Power Shift
tooltip: Instead of Knocking targets back, targets are Knocked toward you.

name: Reckless Endangerment
tooltip: Has a 10% chance each hit to apply Recklesson you. If fully maintained and you have 3 stacks of Reckless, they are refreshed.

name: Reckless Endangerment
tooltip: The final combo hit applies Reckless to you.

name: Reckless Endangerment
tooltip: Using this power applies Reckless to you.

name: Single Minded
tooltip: Targets who are close to the Psychic Vortex have a chance to be Stunned.

name: Sudden Strike
tooltip: If you lunge from more than 50 feet away your next single target Melee Critical has 15% more severity. Sudden Strike is a Chi Energy effect.

name: Charged Up
tooltip: If this power consumes any Negative Ions, it applies Charged Up to you and affected allies. Charged Up increases your Running Speed by 15%, your Jump Height by 2%, and your Flying Speed by 2%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and lasts 10 seconds.

name: Magma Burst
tooltip: Deals an additional Fire damage to your primary target and secondary targets.  Has a 45-100% chance to apply Clinging Flames to all targets.

name: Spitfire
tooltip: Increases the chance to apply Clinging Flames from 10% to 20%. Also guarantees the application of Clinging Flames to all targets hit by your Fire Breath when it is fully maintained.

name: Superconductor
tooltip: Fully charging this power applies Superconductor to the target.+ Superconductor reduces the target's resistance to Electrical damage by -18% for 12 seconds.
